summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new authentication features: OTP login/signup, forgot password flow, and admin Excel export. Backend APIs working 100%, frontend mostly functional with one OTP registration issue.

integration_issues.issue: OTP verification fails during registration with 500 server error

passed_tests: Backend: OTP send/verify endpoints working (100% success)
Backend: Forgot password/reset password flow working
Backend: Admin Excel export with date range working
Frontend: Login page Email/Mobile toggle working
Frontend: OTP login flow working (successful authentication)
Frontend: Forgot password page accessible and functional
Frontend: Reset password flow working end-to-end
Frontend: Admin dashboard date range inputs working
Frontend: Admin Excel export button working with download
Frontend: Admin users table displaying correctly (18 users)
Integration: OTP login creates user and sets auth cookies
Integration: Password reset generates valid tokens
Integration: Admin authentication and role-based access working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OTP registration 500 server error - OTP verification endpoint fails when creating new users via phone registration
